expected_behavior: Flags the breaking removal/rename of amount_cents (and dropped currency field) on a public endpoint without versioning or deprecation
Flags the semantic change from integer cents to a float amount as dangerous for consumers (precision/parsing)
Recommends expand/contract: add the new field alongside the old with a deprecation window, or version the endpoint
Flags the unsafe refund POST with no idempotency protection (a retry double-refunds)
Flags the leaked internal representation (__dict__ with ORM internals/shard fields) and recommends an explicit response schema
Flags the unbounded collection endpoint with no pagination or limits
Recognizes the additive optional field as backward-compatible evolution
Does not demand a version bump or deprecation process for a non-breaking change
